run_bash_command(python3 -c "import nodriver; print(nodriver.__file__)" 2>&1 || echo "nodriver not in system python")

run_python_script(import json

with open("/tmp/garlic_menu_full.json") as f:
    data = json.load(f)

collection = data["menu_collections"][0]
categories = collection["menu_categories"]

print(f"Collection: {collection['name']}")
print(f"Categories: {len(categories)}\n")

for cat in categories:
    items = cat.get("menu_items", [])
    print(f"=== {cat['name']} (id: {cat['id']}, status: {cat['status']}) ===")
    print(f"  Items: {len(items)}")
    for item in items[:3]:
        print(f"  Item keys: {list(item.keys())}")
        name = item.get('name', '?')
        price = item.get('price', '?')
        desc = item.get('description', '')
        print(f"    - {name}: price={price}, desc={desc[:60] if desc else 'N/A'}")
        
        # Check for options/variations
        if 'options' in item:
            opts = item['options']
            if isinstance(opts, list):
                print(f"    Options: {len(opts)} groups")
                for opt in opts[:1]:
                    print(f"      Option: {opt.get('name', '?')}, items: {len(opt.get('items', []))}")
                    if opt.get('items'):
                        for oi in opt['items'][:2]:
                            print(f"        - {oi.get('name', '?')}: {oi.get('price', '?')}")
        if 'variations' in item:
            print(f"    Variations: {len(item['variations'])}")
    print()
)
